integration_validation_v2.evidence: comfy.rs:265-269 map_comfy_routing_intent_to_intake_lane preserves accepted/pending/rejected(skipped) lanes for both generated and imported outputs via one shared rule; record_intake_output (comfy.rs:2051) persists outputs with source task/run refs (workflow_run_id, registration_id) into atelier_comfy_intake_output. Lane mapping tested at routing_tests.rs:74-100; sr2 NA for the pure mapping.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-108 [Pose-ComfyUI-Pipeline] Accepted/Pending/Rejected Workflow Lanes -- Preserve image-sourcing lanes after generated/imported outputs
mapping workflow outputs into Core intake/media states with source task/run refs.
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Accepted/Pending/Rejected Workflow Lanes
scope.summary: MT-108 [Pose-ComfyUI-Pipeline] Accepted/Pending/Rejected Workflow Lanes -- Preserve image-sourcing lanes after generated/imported outputs, mapping workflow outputs into Core intake/media states with source task/run refs.
